key.name: location-mode
key.description: How to determine the user's location. 'auto' — try Geoclue first, then IP fallback, then cached. 'manual' — use the lat/lng set in manual-latitude / manual-longitude. 'city' — use the bundled city database (manual-latitude / manual-longitude set automatically).

key.name: manual-latitude
key.description: Latitude used when location-mode is 'manual' or 'city'.

key.name: manual-longitude
key.description: Longitude used when location-mode is 'manual' or 'city'.

key.name: manual-city-name
key.description: Display-only: name of the city selected via the city search.

key.name: prayer-method
key.description: Prayer time calculation method. 0 = Muslim World League, 1 = ISNA, 2 = Egypt, 3 = Umm al-Qura, 4 = Karachi, 5 = Tehran, 6 = Jafari, 7 = Custom.

key.name: asr-method
key.description: 0 = Shafii (standard), 1 = Hanafi.

key.name: high-latitude-method
key.description: 0 = None, 1 = Middle of Night, 2 = One-Seventh of Night, 3 = Angle-Based.

key.name: fajr-angle
key.description: Only used when prayer-method is Custom.

key.name: isha-angle
key.description: Only used when prayer-method is Custom (and method does not use fixed minutes).

key.name: offset-fajr
key.description: Manual minutes adjustment applied to calculated Fajr time. Positive = later, negative = earlier.

key.name: offset-dhuhr
key.description: Manual minutes adjustment applied to calculated Dhuhr time.

key.name: offset-asr
key.description: Manual minutes adjustment applied to calculated Asr time.

key.name: offset-maghrib
key.description: Manual minutes adjustment applied to calculated Maghrib time.

key.name: offset-isha
key.description: Manual minutes adjustment applied to calculated Isha time.

key.name: prayer-snooze-duration
key.description: How long to snooze a prayer notification before re-alerting.

key.name: prayer-iqamah-reminder-offset
key.description: Minutes after the adhan to fire an iqamah reminder. 0 disables the iqamah reminder.

key.name: prayer-ending-soon-offset
key.description: Minutes before the next prayer to fire a "prayer time ending soon" warning. 0 disables the warning.

key.name: prayer-sound-fajr
key.summary: Sound file path for Fajr adhan

key.name: prayer-sound-dhuhr
key.summary: Sound file path for Dhuhr adhan

key.name: prayer-sound-asr
key.summary: Sound file path for Asr adhan

key.name: prayer-sound-maghrib
key.summary: Sound file path for Maghrib adhan

key.name: prayer-sound-isha
key.summary: Sound file path for Isha adhan

key.name: adhkar-language
key.description: 'en' for English, 'fr' for French.

key.name: adhkar-morning-offset
key.description: Minutes after sunrise to fire the morning adhkar reminder. 0 = at sunrise.

key.name: adhkar-evening-offset
key.description: Minutes before Maghrib to fire the evening adhkar reminder. 0 = at Maghrib.

key.name: adhkar-post-prayer-offset
key.description: Minutes after each prayer to fire the post-prayer adhkar reminder. 0 = immediately after prayer time.

key.name: quran-frequency
key.description: 'daily' — once per day 'weekly' — once per week (Fridays) 'after-fajr' — after Fajr prayer 'after-isha' — after Isha prayer 'every-6h' — every 6 hours 'random' — random time within a user-set window

key.name: quran-daily-goal
key.description: Number of Quran pages to aim for each day.

key.name: quran-offset
key.summary: Offset after prayer for Quran reminder
key.description: Minutes after Fajr/Isha to send the Quran reminder (only for after-fajr/after-isha frequencies).

key.name: quran-window-start
key.description: Start of the random reminder window (0-23). Only used when frequency is 'random'.

key.name: quran-window-end
key.description: End of the random reminder window (0-23). Only used when frequency is 'random'.

key.name: events-friday-enabled
key.description: Notifications for Thursday night, Friday morning, and Friday afternoon.

key.name: events-friday-thursday-hour
key.description: Hour of the Thursday night reminder (0-23).

key.name: events-friday-morning-hour
key.description: Hour of the Friday morning reminder (0-23).

key.name: events-friday-afternoon-hour
key.description: Hour of the Friday afternoon reminder (0-23).

key.name: events-ashura-enabled
key.description: Reminder on Muharram 10 (Ashura).

key.name: events-ashura-daybefore
key.description: Show a heads-up the day before Ashura.

key.name: events-arafah-enabled
key.description: Reminder on Dhul Hijjah 9 (Day of Arafah).

key.name: events-arafah-daybefore
key.description: Show a heads-up the day before Arafah.

key.name: events-whitedays-enabled
key.description: Reminder on the 13th-15th of each Hijri month.

key.name: ramadan-enabled
key.description: Auto-activate Ramadan mode when Hijri month is 9.

key.name: force-ramadan
key.description: Override: show Ramadan display even when not month 9.

key.name: ramadan-taraweeh-enabled
key.description: Reminder after Isha during Ramadan.

key.name: ramadan-taraweeh-offset
key.description: Minutes after Isha to send the Taraweeh reminder.

key.name: ramadan-laylat-qadr-enabled
key.description: Special reminders on the odd nights of the last ten days.

key.name: ramadan-daily-dua-enabled
key.description: Show a daily dua during Ramadan.

key.name: ui-language
key.description: Override the system locale for Nidaa UI strings. 'en' (default) — use system locale. 'ar' — Arabic. 'fr' — French.
